calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME AND GENDER
Off Calendar Nov-01-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change and Gender Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288

Petitioner Michelle Rajunov present in court.
Petitioner Sworn and examined.
Proof of Publication and Declaration of Sworn Physician on file.

No objections to the proposed change of name and gender were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to Micah Rajunov and Gender from female to male.
Decree Changing Name and Gender signed by the Court.
